CHART92
The Moon placed in 7th to Mercury indicates some blemish
to the mother of the native. The Sun and Jupiter are on one side of
Rahu-Ketu axis. Saturn and Mars have exchange of places, with Rahu
in the middle. This makes the native endeared to his father and drifting
away from his mother. He will have good education and be an intellectual.
He will be employed in an industrial unit. He will be highly moral and
will have a helping nature. After 28 he will rise and earn name and fame
